title: Defeat of Orban Removes Ukraine’s Biggest Nemesis in Europe
summary_full: The Hungarian leader’s pro-Moscow tilt cemented his reputation in Kyiv as a spoiler. Now, Ukraine hopes a 90 billion euro loan he blocked will be disbursed.
summary_public: The Hungarian leader’s pro-Moscow tilt cemented his reputation in Kyiv as a spoiler. Now, Ukraine hopes a 90 billion euro loan he blocked will be disbursed.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: pro-Moscow tilt cemented his reputation in Kyiv as a spoiler

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine hopes a 90 billion euro loan he blocked will be disbursed
